verifier_notes: Fresh verifier rerun. All 25 ACs pass. wizard.html is 3049 bytes, 21 visible words, exactly one <button> (Post agent), one <form method=post>, four labeled fields (name/personality/bot_token required, allowlist optional), var(--accent) used only on button.cta rules, :root tokens byte-identical to landing.html, landing.html sha256 unchanged from snapshot. Siblings bootstrap-proof-loop, scaffold-service-stubs, test-harness, landing-mockup-steve-ive all still PASS.
